ddls:
CREATE TABLE "temperature_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each temperature record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "month" TEXT /* Month the data was recorded */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the region where the data was collected */,
  "latitude_square" TEXT /* Latitude range of the data collection area */,
  "longitude_square" TEXT /* Longitude range of the data collection area */,
  "sea_surface_temp" REAL /* Sea surface temperature for the specific month */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., satellite, buoy, ship) */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "data_collection_date" TEXT /* Exact date and time of data collection */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection (e.g., remote sensing, in-situ measurements) */,
  "data_reliability_score" REAL /* Score indicating the reliability of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_temperature_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "latitude_range" TEXT /* Latitude range of the region */,
  "longitude_range" TEXT /* Longitude range of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "depth_range" TEXT /* Depth range of the region */,
  "ecosystem_type" TEXT /* Type of ecosystem in the region */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the region's details were updated */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection in this region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, climatologist, marine biologist) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the user is affiliated with */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the user account was updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each temperature record
